+ÉÉè® =BÉDiÉ ÉÊxÉÉÊvÉ |É¤ÉÆvÉBÉE BÉEÉÒ {ÉÉÆSÉ ´É−ÉÇ BÉEÉÒ +É´ÉÉÊvÉ 3 xÉ´ÉÆ¤É®, 2013 BÉEÉä ºÉàÉÉ{iÉ cÉä MÉ<Ç cè * +ÉiÉ&, +É¤É BÉEåpÉÒªÉ ºÉ®BÉEÉ®, {ÉªÉÉÇ´É®hÉ ®ÉciÉ ÉÊxÉÉÊvÉ ºBÉEÉÒàÉ, 2008 BÉEä {Éè®É 4 BÉEä ={É {Éè®É (2) BÉEä ºÉÉlÉ {ÉÉÊ~iÉ ãÉÉäBÉE nÉÉÊªÉi´É ¤ÉÉÒàÉÉ +ÉÉÊvÉÉÊxÉªÉàÉ, 1991 (1991 BÉEÉ 6) BÉEÉÒ vÉÉ®É 7BÉE uÉ®É |ÉnkÉ ¶ÉÉÎBÉDiÉªÉÉå BÉEÉ |ÉªÉÉäMÉ BÉE®iÉä cÖA 31 ÉÊnºÉÆ¤É®, 2014 iÉBÉE BÉEÉÒ +É´ÉÉÊvÉ BÉEä ÉÊãÉA {ÉªÉÉÇ´É®hÉ ®ÉciÉ ÉÊxÉÉÊvÉ ºBÉEÉÒàÉ, 2008 BÉEä +ÉvÉÉÒxÉ ÉÊxÉÉÊvÉ |É¤ÉÆvÉBÉE BÉEä °ô{É àÉå ªÉÚxÉÉ<]äb <ÆÉÊbªÉÉ <Æ¶ªÉÉä®åºÉ BÉEÆ{ÉxÉÉÒ ÉÊãÉÉÊàÉ]äb BÉEÉä {ÉÖxÉ& ÉÊxÉªÉÖBÉDiÉ BÉE®iÉÉÒ cè * [{ÉEÉ.ºÉÆ. 18-13/91-{ÉÉÒAãÉ-ASÉAºÉAàÉbÉÒ] +ÉVÉªÉ iªÉÉMÉÉÒ, ºÉÆªÉÖBÉDiÉ ºÉÉÊSÉ´É -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 10th July, 2014 G.S.R.497(E).—Whereas, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 7A of the Public Liability Insurance Act, 1991 (6 of 1991), the _ Central Government framed a scheme, namely, “the Environment Relief Fund Scheme, 2008"; and Whereas, sub-paragraph (1) of paragraph 4 of the said scheme provided that the United India Insurance Company Limited shall be the Fund Manager for a period of five years from the date of notification of the said scheme; and Whereas, the five year term of the said Fund Manager have since expired on 3rd November, 2013. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 7 A of the Public Liability Insurance Act, 1991 (6 of 1991) read with sub-paragraph (2) of paragraph 4 of the Environment Relief Fund Scheme, 2008, the Central Government hereby reappoints the United India Insurance Company Limited as a Fund Manager under the Environment Relief Fund Scheme, 2008, for a period up to 31st December, 2014. [F. No. 18-13/91-PL-HSMD] AJAY TYAGI, Jt.
